channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Helen Slater reflects on Supergirl's legacy and encourages Milly Alcock to ignore online criticism
item.description: Helen Slater, who starred as Supergirl in the 1984 film, has offered words of encouragement to Australian actor Milly Alcock as she faces online criticism ahead of her portrayal of the iconic superher...

item.title: EDSIEC Prepares for Edo LG Elections with 10,000 Staff and Security Measures
item.description: The Edo State Independent Electoral Commission (EDSIEC) has deployed 10,000 temporary staff to manage the local government elections across the state. The commission chairman, Jonathan Aifuobhokhan, c...

item.title: Texas Bakery Faces Backlash After Criticizing MAGA in Viral Post
item.description: A Texas bakery, Hive Bakery in Flower Mound, sparked national attention after a Facebook post criticizing the MAGA movement went viral. The bakery expressed disappointment in the country's political c...

item.title: US national Matthew Aaron VanDyk seeks court permission to cook his own meals in Tihar Jail, citing health concerns
item.description: US national Matthew Aaron VanDyk, who was arrested by the National Investigation Agency (NIA) in connection with the alleged Myanmar terror training case, has approached a Delhi court seeking permissi...

item.title: Dr. Paul Msoka's Leadership Drives Sustainable Development in Tanzania
item.description: Dr. Paul Msoka has emerged as a key figure in Tanzania's development landscape, showcasing how determination and vision can turn adversity into remarkable achievements. His journey from humble beginni...

item.title: Europe Faces Record Heat and Deadly Heat Dome in June 2026
item.description: The article discusses the unprecedented heatwave that struck Europe in June 2026, marking the warmest June on record for Western Europe according to the Copernicus Climate Change Service. A deadly hea...

item.title: 23-year-old paramedic remembered for kindness and compassion after N.B. collision
item.description: Jenna Croucher, a 23-year-old paramedic from Prince Edward Island, died in a tragic collision between an ambulance and a transport truck in New Brunswick on Tuesday. Her father, Robin Croucher, descri...

item.title: Cronulla Sharks Host Brisbane Broncos in NRLW Round 2 at Ocean Protect Stadium
item.description: The Cronulla Sharks will take on the Brisbane Broncos in Round 2 of the 2026 NRL Women's Premiership at Ocean Protect Stadium in Sydney. This match, scheduled for July 9, 2026, marks a significant eve...

item.title: Trump praises SpaceX's Shotwell for $325M donation to Trump Accounts
item.description: President Donald Trump publicly praised Gwynne Shotwell, CEO of SpaceX, and her husband Robert for their $325 million donation to the Trump Accounts, a tax-advantaged savings account for American chil...

item.title: Former EALA MP Abubakar Zein Dies and Buried in Nairobi After Battle with Illness
item.description: Former East African Legislative Assembly (EALA) member Abubakar Zein passed away at Avenue Hospital in Nairobi on July 7, 2026, after complications from his medical treatment. He was laid to rest at L...

item.title: Comelec Stands Unaffected by Ombudsman's Case Against Marcoleta
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has clarified that its decisions remain independent of actions taken by other government agencies, including the Office of the Ombudsman, amid an ongoing plunder ...

item.title: Enslaved African Muslims' Resilience: Faith and Resistance Through History
item.description: The article explores the enduring legacy of enslaved African Muslims in America, highlighting their efforts to preserve Islamic faith despite brutal conditions. Scholars estimate that up to 30% of Afr...

item.title: Ontario-Alberta Pipeline Proposal Criticized as Unnecessary and Costly
item.description: The article critiques Ontario Premier Doug Ford's proposed interprovincial oil pipeline project with Alberta, arguing it is a flawed and expensive endeavor. Key points include: 1) The plan fails to ad...

item.title: Australia and India strengthen Indo-Pacific security ties with defence, uranium and education deals
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi have announced a comprehensive agreement to deepen bilateral relations across trade, education, defence, science and technology....

item.title: Tanzania urged to boost health-focused research and local drug development
item.description: Tanzania's Education Minister, Professor Adolf Mkenda, has called for increased investment in scientific research and pharmaceutical development to tackle domestic health issues. During a visit to the...

item.title: DepEd Audit Reveals Insufficient Security Measures in Public Schools
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) reported that only 36% of the country's 48,000 public schools have installed closed-circuit television (CCTV) cameras, with most located in urban areas. Education U...

item.title: DR Congo Ebola outbreak expands into new provinces as death toll reaches 600
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo's latest Ebola outbreak has continued to worsen, with the reported death toll reaching 600 and new suspected cases emerging outside the outbreak's original epicentre i...

item.title: Court hears corruption allegations against four current and former Ekurhuleni senior officials
item.description: Four current and former senior officials linked to the City of Ekurhuleni appeared in court after being arrested during an overnight operation led by the task team established to implement the recomme...

item.title: Debate over tennis tournament formats, British player injuries and financial barriers to success
item.description: The discussion centers on the structure of professional tennis tournaments, with debates about whether men's and women's grand slam events should start with best-of-five sets from round one. Critics a...

item.title: White House Condemns Reporter's Air Force One Swap Story as 'Fake News'
item.description: The White House's communications director, Steven Cheung, launched a scathing attack on a Pulitzer-winning reporter, Carol Leonnig, for a story detailing President Donald Trump's abrupt switch from th...
